caption: A news segment features a split-screen layout. On the left, a smaller inset shows a man wearing a red traditional cap and dark clothing. On the right, a larger portrait displays a smiling man with glasses wearing a blue pinstripe suit and a blue tie. Both are set against a purple and red graphic background. The text "ON THE PHONE" appears at the top, with a label identifying the man in the inset as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI" and "POLITICAL ANALYST," further noted as being in "LAGOS." The "plustv" logo is visible in the upper left corners. A white banner at the bottom reads "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." Across the sequential frames, the visuals remain static, but the bottom-most white bar changes: it initially displays "WATCH ONLINE" and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV," then transitions to "SUBSCRIBE" and "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA," and finally shifts to "SUBSCRIBE" and "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE."
